summary: Comprehensive testing of NEW AI Goal Creation feature completed. All backend API tests pass (6/6 = 100%). All frontend UI tests pass (12/12 = 100%). The feature allows users to generate AI-powered SMART goals from their financial insights, which are saved to localStorage and displayed in the Goal Tracker.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/ai/generate-goals without insights returns success:false with message
Backend: POST /api/ai/generate-goals with valid insights returns goals array
Backend: Generated goals have all required fields (title, description, targetAmount, currentAmount, deadline, category)
Backend: GET /api/ai/insights/cached with auth returns valid response
Frontend: After insights generated, 'Turn Insights into Goals' card appears (data-testid='create-goals-card')
Frontend: 'Create Goals from Insights' button visible (data-testid='create-goals-btn')
Frontend: After clicking 'Create Goals from Insights', goals are saved to localStorage under 'profitpilot_goals' key
Frontend: After goals created, success message shown (data-testid='goals-created-message') with 'View Goals' button (data-testid='view-goals-btn')
Frontend: Goal Tracker page shows the newly created AI goals with proper formatting
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing demo account with cached AI insights.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Goal Creation feature fully tested and working. Flow: 1) User navigates to /insights, 2) Clicks 'Generate Insights' (or uses cached insights), 3) 'Turn Insights into Goals' card appears, 4) User clicks 'Create Goals from Insights', 5) Backend calls GPT-4o to generate SMART goals, 6) Goals saved to localStorage 'profitpilot_goals', 7) User clicks 'View Goals' to navigate to /goal-tracker where goals are displayed. Backend endpoint: POST /api/ai/generate-goals (FastAPI in server.py). Goal schema: {id, title, description, targetAmount, currentAmount, deadline, category, status}. All data-testid attributes properly implemented.
